text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Japanese Derby rapidly approaching,
the wave of hype is about to crest...

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
Although an injury kept her from competing in
the Satsuki Sho, she put on a performance worthy
of a junior champion last year, and she might just
steal the show at this year's Derby...

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
Continuing on, Yaeno Muteki is considered to be
the next best contender, considering how
splendidly she performed at the Satsuki Sho...

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
But let's not forget about Sakura Chiyono O,
whose running at the Asahi Hai left a lasting
impression. Having maintained a consistent
running form since last year, her chances of
victory are equally strong.

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
Will Mejiro Ardan be able to outshine her sister
Ramonu? This is yet another major point of
discussion...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The mass media is rife with the opinion that last
year's junior champion is most likely to win the
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Honestly though, I'm not entirely convinced this
consensus is warranted. The reason being...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've seen—firsthand—alarming improvements in
both Yaeno Muteki and Sakura Chiyono O since
they started their classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although, funnily enough... I could say the same
of Mejiro Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So, from my perspective, I expect Mejiro Ardan's
greatest rivals for the moment will be Sakura
Chiyono O and Yaeno Muteki.
choice_data_list: (...It's almost like their hearts beat as one.)
(...It's almost like their hearts beat as one.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this strange thought occurring to me, I leave
my office and head off to meet Mejiro Ardan for
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That evening...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan is pushing herself with a passion
unlike anything I've seen in her before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I'm not done yet. One more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know she's very eager, what with the Derby
coming up, but she hasn't been herself recently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She always runs like there's no tomorrow, but...
I'm sensing a kind of desperation in her right now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, please let me run a few more laps. I can
handle it, so—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ardan suddenly loses balance—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I manage to catch her right before she hits
the ground!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I'm terribly sorry...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can ignore this. If she keeps up
this intensity, it won't just be the Japanese Derby
she has to say goodbye to, it'll be her entire
racing career!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I wish to surpass my limits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I shan't back down.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I don't wish to be held back by words like limits!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: If I don't surpass who I am now... If I can't do that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Then... how can I hope to win the Japanese
Derby?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I won't stand a chance of outshining my older
sister!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: After the Aoba Sho, I realized something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I realized that I have a great fear in my
heart—one I cannot dismiss...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: No, it's rather that... I have an unwavering belief.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I know how Chiyono O feels about the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And I know that the yearning she harbors is pure
and sincere, and as vibrant with color as a cherry
blossom in full bloom.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I know how Yaeno seeks strong competition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And I know that beneath her tranquil exterior, she
houses a warrior's spirit as ferocious as fire.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
They've been so kind to me all this time, and in
that time I've come to know their feelings.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
They are my dearest friends... and they are
irreplaceable.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And that is precisely why I can't help being
certain.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Certain that they will be there at the Japanese Derby, harboring those feelings and dazzling with incomparable light.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And that if I were to race them in their current
condition, without having improved myself since
the Aoba Sho, I'd not be able to win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And I'd have no hope of surpassing my older
sister's brilliance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...The source of these thoughts is something akin
to intuition. I wouldn't mind if you dismissed all
I've said as drivel, but I—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan has an accurate grasp of the
difference in running ability between herself and
her rivals. She knows better than I do how they
compare. This, I'm sure of.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And that's because...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...I know Ardan has her doubts, but I believe in
her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I have faith that she'll ace her debut and be able
to race together with Yaeno and me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I have an inkling myself of just how profound her
feelings about racing are.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But it's not like I'm any less committed myself!
That's why, when we eventually compete
someday, I'm going to race with all I've got!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Especially for the Japanese Derby... There's no
way I'm letting anybody else win that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O has that same faith in Mejiro
Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And just as Sakura Chiyono O said, Mejiro Ardan
is currently fighting for a chance to race against
her and Yaeno Muteki in the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though I haven't asked Yaeno Muteki directly, I
bet she believes in Ardan the same way. That's
how strong the bonds between those three are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And if the Japanese Derby has helped Mejiro
Ardan realize what kind of connection they share,
it must be a very special race—and one that'll
play host to a real clash of wills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To ensure that Mejiro Ardan wins, that she steps
out from her legendary older sister's shadow, and
that she realizes her dreams...
choice_data_list: Let's keep training until the very end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the time we have left, I'm going to train Mejiro
Ardan as much as possible, then see her enter the
Japanese Derby in full health.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's going to push her legs and her dazzling
light to the extreme, then I'll need to commit my
full attention to finding out what the extreme
looks like.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That is my resolve as a trainer. And as the trainer who made a vow to Mejiro Ardan's nanny and her physician, it's also my duty.
choice_data_list: I'll make sure to stop you before you go too far.
I'll make sure to stop you before you go too far.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You always try your best... to see things the same
way I do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...And for that, I am forever grateful.
choice_data_list:
How about a short break? Then let's see if you
can run some more after that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Sure!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I shall take the time I have left before the
Japanese Derby... and turn every moment of it
into my light.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
To you, who shines down from so high... I shall
outshine you with my own dazzling light.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: At the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: To realize my hopes, and my dreams...

text_block_list.name: All Three
text_block_list.text: ...I'm going to win!
